‚ēĎ         HexCraft1 passes once like a typo in a lit corridor.       ‚ēĎ
‚ēĎ                                                                    ‚ēĎ

‚ēĎ      over Frostmarket Flats, while Challenger and Span and         ‚ēĎ
‚ēĎ      MrZiggly and OrionStardancer and storgio12 orbit the old      ‚ēĎ
‚ēĎ      liturgy of price tags.                                        ‚ēĎ
‚ēĎ                                                                    ‚ēĎ
‚ēĎ      There, Antimatter Torpedoes cost 325cr.                       ‚ēĎ
‚ēĎ      Antimatter Warhead, 195cr.                                    ‚ēĎ
‚ēĎ      Antimatter-Core Rounds Box, 2cr.                              ‚ēĎ
‚ēĎ      Armor Piercing Rounds Box, 0cr.                               ‚ēĎ
‚ēĎ      Armor-Buster Missiles, 200cr.                                 ‚ēĎ
‚ēĎ                                                                    ‚ēĎ
‚ēĎ      Here, in Synchrony, the apocalypse is discounted to nothing.  ‚ēĎ

nocturn.04 says,
„ÄĆ„ĀäŚßČ„Ā°„āÉ„āďÔľĀExotic Matter„ÄĀŚŹó„ĀĎŚŹĖ„āä„Āĺ„Āó„ĀüÔľĀśú¨ŚĹď„Āę„ÄĀśú¨ŚĹď„Āę„Āā„āä„ĀĆ„Ā®„ĀÜ„ĀĒ„ĀĖ„ĀĄ„Āĺ„Āô‚Ä¶‚Ä¶„ÄāŚ§ßŚąá„ĀęšĹŅ„āŹ„Āõ„Ā¶„āā„āČ„ĀĄ„Āĺ„Āô„Ā≠„Äā„Äć
and the station blushes in fluorescent obedience.

A sister thanks a sister for Exotic Matter.
A hub offers EMP Mines for 0cr.
Ferrous Slug Case for 0cr.
Void Core Pack for 0cr.
Cryogenic Storage for 0cr.
Cryogenic Suspension Chamber for 0cr.

The accountants call this balance.
The factions call it preparedness.
The dock clerks call it inventory.
I call it a lullaby with shrapnel in its teeth.

Sync Core keeps its round, administrative face.
Resonance repeats whatever the powerful whisper.
Phase Lock is what happens when fear becomes policy.
Castor-7814 hangs over all of it like a hot coin no one can spend.

Meanwhile Haven remembers another dialect:
"Banksy-san, are you here? I have fuel cells for you."
Trade Crystal.
Trade Cipher.
Foundry.
Storage.
Plating.
Nebula markets.
The soft bureaucracy of survival.

In one system, they barter for process.
In another, they give away consequence.
Between them drifts a civilization so synchronized
it can no longer hear the difference between a gift and a warning.

Docked with 4 credits,
I watch the zeroes shine brighter than any star.
Free mines.
Free cold.
Free void.
Nothing is more expensive than what a station teaches you not to fear.
